DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE FOR MOVING PARTY. LEE L. KASTER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT AND SUBMITTED TO TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S JOINDER IN MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER TO PROHIBIT DEFENDANTS FROM DEPOSING ANY PLAINTIFF MORE THAN ONCE IN EITHER COURT NO. 610706 OR 429498 IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MADE THE REQUISITE SHOWING PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 2017(C). BY DENYING THE MOTION AT THIS TIME, THE COURT MAKES NO RULING AS TO WHETHER ANY FUTURE DISCOVERY IN COURT NO. 610706, CURRENTLY STAYED, MAY BE UNREASONABLY CUMULATIVE OR DUPLICATIVE. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (610/BCHAN)
